titleZh: 南通双盈贸易有限公司诉镇江市丹徒区联达机械厂、魏恒聂等六人买卖合同纠纷案
titleEn: Gazette Case: Nantong Shuangying Trading Co., Ltd. v. Lianda Machinery Factory of Dantu District, Zhenjiang, Wei Hengnie et al.
citation: 公报案例：合伙债务对外责任
issuesZh: 未及时变更登记的对外责任
issuesEn: recognition of an actual partnership relationship
external liability despite failure to update registration
holdingZh: 最高人民法院公报案例确认：数人共同经营并对企业经营事项作出共同决定的，可以认定形成合伙关系。合伙人故意不将企业登记性质据实变更为合伙企业，不影响其对外就合伙经营产生的债务承担责任。
holdingEn: The Gazette case confirms that where several persons jointly operate a business and jointly decide its business affairs, a partnership relationship may be found. Their deliberate failure to update the registration to reflect the partnership does not relieve them of external liability for debts incurred in partnership operations.
